response.global_summary: The video features a talk segment followed by a vocal performance of '冒険！スーパーヒーロー☆' by Hololive 3rd generation members (Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel).

scenes.description: The Hololive 3rd generation VTubers are talking and interacting on stage before their performance.
The Hololive 3rd generation members perform '冒険！スーパーヒーロー☆' (Bouken! Super Hero☆) on stage with live instrumental accompaniment.
scenes.song_title: 冒険！スーパーヒーロー☆
